ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this observation belongs to */,
  "X1" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X1 */,
  "X2" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X2 */,
  "X3" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X3 */,
  "X4" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X4 */,
  "X5" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X5 */,
  "X6" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X6 */,
  "X7" REAL /* Measurement from parameter X7 */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor record */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation this factor is derived from */,
  "factor1" REAL /* Value of Factor1 derived from analysis */,
  "factor2" REAL /* Value of Factor2 derived from analysis */,
  "factor3" REAL /* Value of Factor3 derived from analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for statistical analysis (e.g., PCA, FA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factors_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the researcher */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab the researcher is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action taken (e.g., view details, download data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment from which data was exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the export event */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the exported file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment type (e.g., biology, chemistry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)
